payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review). Postgres for both canonical log and cache; events(tenant_id, event_id ULID, ...) PK(tenant_id,event_id); upload = INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (union + idempotency); no S3 for the log initially. Both amendments accepted: incremental replay only for tail-appends (else full replay-in-txn, because SCP-110 de-collision is global); RLS + app-layer scoping (today there is NO tenant concept — claim shape owned by SCP-122). Sub-epic SCP-139 + stories SCP-140..145 accepted. Spike closed.
